evals.prompt: Add an orders list endpoint in my Bun backend. Avoid N+1 queries, use whereIn or bulk loading when looping, update Swagger if it exists, use formatter/linter without ESLint, and add integration tests only at the end.
evals.expected_output: The implementation avoids N+1 queries, uses Biome or Oxlint rather than new ESLint, updates Swagger request/response docs when present, and adds only integration tests at the end.
